title: Account Approved
body: Your driver account has been approved. You can now go online and accept rides.

title: PUSPAKOM Expiring Soon
body: Your PUSPAKOM inspection certificate for WQK 4821 expires on 20 May 2026. Renew before the expiry date to stay active.

title: New Incentive Available
body: Weekend Warrior campaign is live! Complete 20 trips this weekend to earn RM 50.

title: Earnings Transferred
body: RM 480.00 from last week's earnings has been transferred to your bank account.
